articles.title: Lignin-based epoxy resins approach viability for metal coatings

articles.title: Living Plastics Self-Destruct on Command Using Engineered Bacteria
articles.description: Researchers have developed living plastics that self-destruct on command by embedding engineered Bacillus subtilis bacteria producing two cooperative enzymes. articles.title: Canon Launches Raman Analyzer to Solve Black Plastics Recycling Challenge
articles.description: Canon USA has launched the TR-A100 Raman plastic analyzer in North America, offering breakthrough technology that accurately identifies black plastics — materials that conventional near-infrared spectroscopy struggles to detect. This innovation addresses a critical gap in recycling operations, enabling recovery of plastics previously destined for landfills and supporting more sustainable material management practices.

articles.title: Resin Buyers Face Five Market Shocks in One Week
articles.description: Resin buyers confronted five major market disruptions within one week, including crude oil price swings exceeding 12%, a force majeure declaration at a major polypropylene facility, antidumping challenges affecting US polyethylene exports, PA66 capacity reductions, and engineered resins consolidation.
